data.name: add_initial_admin
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.add_initial_admin(admin_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO admin_users (user_id) VALUES (admin_user_id);
END;
$function$

data.name: create_post
data.arguments: p_title text, p_content text, p_description text, p_category text, p_image_url text, p_image_ratio double precision, p_user_id uuid
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_post(p_title text, p_content text, p_description text, p_category text, p_image_url text, p_image_ratio double precision, p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  new_post JSONB;
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO posts (
    title, 
    content, 
    description, 
    category, 
    image_url, 
    image_ratio, 
    user_id
  ) 
  VALUES (
    p_title, 
    p_content, 
    p_description, 
    p_category, 
    p_image_url, 
    p_image_ratio, 
    p_user_id
  )
  RETURNING to_jsonb(posts.*) INTO new_post;
  
  RETURN new_post;
END;
$function$

data.name: decrement
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.decrement(x integer)
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN x - 1;
END;
$function$

data.name: delete_post
delete_post_admin

data.name: get_all_posts
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_all_posts()
 RETURNS SETOF json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY 
  SELECT 
    json_build_object(
      'id', p.id,
      'created_at', p.created_at,
      'user_id', p.user_id,
      'title', p.title,
      'category', p.category,
      'content', p.content,
      'description', p.content, -- 复制content到description字段
      'image_url', p.image_url,
      'image_ratio', COALESCE(p.image_ratio, 0.75),
      'likes', COALESCE(p.likes, 0),
      'likes_count', COALESCE(p.likes, 0), -- 复制likes到likes_count字段
      'comments', COALESCE(p.comments, 0),
      'comments_count', COALESCE(p.comments, 0), -- 复制comments到comments_count字段
      'username', COALESCE((SELECT u.raw_user_meta_data->>'username' FROM auth.users u WHERE u.id = p.user_id), '匿名用户')
    )
  FROM 
    public.posts p
  ORDER BY 
    p.created_at DESC;
END;
$function$

data.name: get_posts_with_users
data.result: TABLE(id uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone, user_id uuid, title text, category text, description text, image_url text, username text, email text)
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_posts_with_users()
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone, user_id uuid, title text, category text, description text, image_url text, username text, email text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY 
    SELECT 
        p.id,
        p.created_at,
        p.user_id,
        p.title,
        p.category,
        p.description,
        p.image_url,
        u.username,
        u.email
    FROM 
        public.posts p
    LEFT JOIN 
        auth.users u ON p.user_id = u.id
    ORDER BY 
        p.created_at DESC;
END;
$function$

data.name: get_table_info
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_table_info(table_name text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
  result json;
BEGIN
  SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(cols))
  INTO result
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      column_name, 
      data_type,
      is_nullable
    FROM 
      information_schema.columns
    WHERE 
      table_name = $1
      AND table_schema = 'public'
  ) cols;
  
  RETURN result;
END;
$function$

data.name: handle_new_user
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO public.profiles (id, username)
  VALUES (NEW.id, NEW.email);
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

data.name: increment
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.increment(x integer)
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN x + 1;
END;
$function$

data.name: like_post
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.like_post(p_post_id uuid, p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO likes (post_id, user_id)
  VALUES (p_post_id, p_user_id)
  ON CONFLICT (post_id, user_id) DO NOTHING;
  UPDATE posts SET likes_count = likes_count + 1 WHERE id = p_post_id;
END;
$function$

data.name: list_posts
data.result: TABLE(id uuid, title text, description text, image_url text, image_ratio double precision, category text, created_at timestamp with time zone, user_id uuid, username text, likes_count bigint, comments_count bigint)
data.arguments: limits integer DEFAULT 20, offsets integer DEFAULT 0, category_filter text DEFAULT NULL::text
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.list_posts(limits integer DEFAULT 20, offsets integer DEFAULT 0, category_filter text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, title text, description text, image_url text, image_ratio double precision, category text, created_at timestamp with time zone, user_id uuid, username text, likes_count bigint, comments_count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
begin
  return query 
  SELECT 
    p.id,
    p.title,
    p.description,
    p.image_url,
    p.image_ratio,
    p.category,
    p.created_at,
    p.user_id,
    u.username,
    (SELECT count(*) FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id) as likes_count,
    (SELECT count(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) as comments_count
  FROM posts p
  LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id
  WHERE (category_filter IS NULL OR p.category = category_filter)
  ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
  LIMIT limits
  OFFSET offsets;
end;
$function$

data.name: search_user_by_email
data.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.search_user_by_email(p_email text)
 RETURNS SETOF auth.users
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  -- 检查调用者是否是管理员
  IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM admins WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION '没有权限执行此操作';
  END IF;
  
  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT * FROM auth.users
  WHERE email ILIKE p_email
  LIMIT 1;
END;
$function$
